name: Escalloped Oysters
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts select Chesapeake Bay oysters (about 60), with a little liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the bread and cracker crumbs with melted butter.
2. Spread a thin layer of the mixture (about 1/3) over the bottom of a well-buttered, large baking dish (9 x 12 x 2-inches).
3. Cover with half of the oysters; sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Dribble half of the oyster liquor and half of the cream over top.
5. Repeat with another layer of buttered crumbs (about 1/3), the remaining oysters, salt and pepper, the remaining oyster liquor and cream, and a final layer of crumbs.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 45 minutes. Serve immediately in the baking dish.
Note: Never use more than two layers of oysters.
